productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Flower Brown Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of Leatherette with a cut out design on the front for added style Has one zippered compartment with an inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles with fake snake skin design and tassles for carrying ease and style One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Metallic embelishment with brand name on the side Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
